summary: Comprehensive testing completed for LMN Infra website with all three verticals. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI/UX excellent with proper navigation, cost estimator functionality, and WhatsApp integration throughout.

design_issues.issue: Dropdown selection has minor interaction issue but dropdown is functional

passed_tests: Backend API - All 16 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section, navigation, and three verticals
Materials page shows catalog with category tabs (Civil, Electrical, Plumbing, Finishing)
Request Quote dialog opens and form fields work properly
Construction page cost estimator calculates correctly (Basic ₹1850, Classic ₹1950, Premium ₹2150 per sq.ft)
Properties page shows all three property listings (Shivantha Gardenia, Evon, Krishna's Arena)
Contact page form fields work properly
WhatsApp floating button visible on all pages
Navy Blue + Gold color scheme implemented correctly
All interactive buttons are clickable and functional
